text: Fixed the widget not being addable on other people's Macs (the framework/widget minimum macOS had crept above the advertised 14.0; all targets are now unified to 14.0)
Fixed login sometimes not restoring right after a reboot, which left usage data missing
Analysis page now uses the actual session start time (fixes the wrong range display and the flat line stretching into the future). Also removed the distracting striped background
Fixed the 7-day chart mixing data across sessions (the previous week's data no longer bleeds in — only the current session is drawn)
Widget footer improvements (more compact, tap-to-refresh feedback, more visible refresh button)
Switched widget data sharing to file I/O (fixes a sandbox mismatch) and prevented tests from destroying the session
Switched widget data sharing from SQLite to UserDefaults, fixing stale data display
v1.0.0 official release (Developer ID signed + Apple notarized)
Color theme setting (System/Light/Dark), also applied to the widget and analysis page
Session navigation on the analysis page (Weekly/Hourly × Session/Calendar, 4 modes)
Renamed to ClaudeUsageTracker with a new icon
Added the analysis page (usage charts, date-range selection, session visualization)
Initial release — a menu bar usage monitor
